recipes.title: Jollof Rice
recipes.description: West African classic spiced rice cooked in tomato sauce.
steps: Heat oil; sauté onion and garlic until translucent.
Add blended pepper, tomatoes, tomato paste, thyme, curry powder; cook 10 mins.
Stir in rice to coat.
Add broth & scotch bonnet; bring to boil, reduce heat, cover and simmer 20–25 mins.
Fluff rice and adjust seasoning. Serve hot.

recipes.title: Efo Riro
recipes.description: Nigerian spinach stew with tomatoes and peppers, can be veganized.
ingredients: 1/2 cup palm oil or vegetable oil
steps: Heat oil; sauté onion and garlic until soft.
Add blended peppers and tomatoes; simmer 10–15 mins.
Stir in chopped spinach; cook until wilted.
Season with salt, pepper (and crayfish powder if using).
Serve with rice, fufu, or yam.

recipes.title: Injera with Misir Wat
recipes.description: Ethiopian spiced lentil stew served on injera.
steps: Heat oil; sauté onion and garlic until soft.
Stir in berbere and tomato paste; cook 2 mins.
Add lentils and broth; bring to boil, then simmer 20–25 mins until thick.
Season with salt.
Serve hot over injera.

recipes.title: Tagine with Vegetables
recipes.description: Moroccan vegetable tagine with aromatic spices.
steps: Heat oil; sauté onion and garlic until fragrant.
Add carrots and potatoes; stir to coat with spices.
Pour in tomato sauce and broth; simmer 10 mins.
Add zucchini; cook another 10–15 mins until veggies are tender.
Season, garnish with parsley, and serve with couscous or bread.

recipes.title: Kachumbari
recipes.description: A fresh East African salad of tomatoes, onions, and chili.
steps: Combine tomatoes, onion, and chili in a bowl.
Squeeze in lime juice and add salt.
Toss well and garnish with chopped coriander.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

recipes.title: Chapati (Kenyan)
recipes.description: Flaky, layered flatbread enjoyed across East Africa.
steps: Mix flour and salt in a bowl.
Add water and oil gradually, kneading into a soft dough.
Let dough rest 30 minutes, then divide and roll into circles.
Cook on a hot skillet until golden brown on both sides.
Brush with oil and keep warm.

recipes.title: Githeri
recipes.description: Traditional Kenyan dish of beans and maize cooked together.
steps: Soak maize and beans overnight, then boil until tender.
In a separate pan, sauté onion and tomatoes in oil.
Add curry powder and cooked maize-bean mix.
Simmer for 10–15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot as main or side dish.

recipes.title: Vegetable Fried Rice
recipes.description: Chinese-style fried rice loaded with vegetables and flavor.
steps: Heat oil in a wok and sauté garlic and onion.
Add carrots and peas, stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add cooked rice and mix well.
Drizzle soy sauce and stir until evenly combined.
Garnish with spring onion and serve hot.

recipes.title: Vegetable Samosas
recipes.description: Deep-fried Indian pastry pockets filled with spiced potatoes and peas.
ingredients: Ready-made samosa pastry or phyllo dough
steps: Heat oil and fry cumin seeds, then add ginger, peas, and mashed potatoes.
Add spices and salt, mix well and cool the filling.
Fill pastry with spoonful of mixture and seal edges.
Deep fry until golden brown.
Serve with chutney.

recipes.title: Pad Thai (Vegan)
recipes.description: A vegan version of Thailand’s most famous stir-fried noodle dish.
steps: Soak rice noodles in warm water until soft.
Mix tamarind, soy sauce, and sugar to make sauce.
Fry garlic and tofu until golden.
Add noodles and sauce, stir well.
Toss in bean sprouts, garnish with peanuts and lime.

recipes.title: Miso Soup
recipes.description: A classic Japanese soup made with miso paste and tofu.
steps: Soak wakame in water for 5 minutes.
Bring water to a simmer, add wakame and tofu.
Dissolve miso paste in a small amount of hot broth, then stir into soup.
Do not boil after adding miso.
Serve with green onions.

recipes.title: Chana Masala
recipes.description: A spicy Indian curry made with chickpeas.
steps: Sauté onion and garlic in oil until golden.
Add tomatoes and spices, cook until soft.
Add chickpeas and simmer for 15 minutes.
Adjust salt and serve with rice or naan.

recipes.title: Stir-fried Tofu with Vegetables
recipes.description: Healthy Chinese-style stir-fry with tofu and colorful vegetables.
steps: Fry tofu until golden and set aside.
Stir-fry garlic, carrot, bell pepper, and broccoli.
Add tofu and soy sauce, mix well.
Cook for 2-3 more minutes and serve hot.

recipes.title: Dal Tadka
recipes.description: Indian yellow lentil stew with aromatic spices.
steps: Boil lentils until soft.
In a pan, sauté cumin, garlic, onion, and tomato.
Add turmeric and mix with cooked dal.
Simmer for 5 minutes and serve hot with rice.

recipes.title: Japchae
recipes.description: Korean glass noodles stir-fried with vegetables.
steps: Boil noodles and set aside.
Sauté vegetables and garlic in sesame oil.
Add noodles, soy sauce, and sugar.
Toss until mixed and serve warm.

recipes.title: Nasi Goreng (Vegan)
recipes.description: Spicy Indonesian fried rice with veggies and sweet soy sauce.
steps: Fry garlic, onion, and veggies until soft.
Add rice and stir well.
Add chili paste and kecap manis, toss until coated.
Serve hot with cucumber slices.

recipes.title: Spring Rolls
recipes.description: Crispy Asian-style vegan rolls filled with vegetables.
steps: Sauté vegetables with garlic and soy sauce.
Cool filling and wrap in spring roll wrappers.
Deep fry until golden brown.
Serve with dipping sauce.

recipes.title: Pilau
recipes.description: A fragrant Swahili rice dish made with spices and sometimes vegetables or meat.
steps: Heat oil in a pot and sauté onions until golden brown.
Add garlic, pilau masala, and whole spices; stir until aromatic.
Add rice and mix well to coat.
Pour in broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered for 20–25 minutes.
Fluff and serve hot.

recipes.title: Mandazi
recipes.description: Sweet, fluffy deep-fried dough from East Africa — a breakfast favorite.
steps: Mix dry ingredients in a bowl.
Add milk and oil; knead into soft dough.
Let rest 30 minutes, then roll and cut into triangles.
Deep fry until golden brown. Drain and serve warm.

recipes.title: Mukimo
recipes.description: A mashed Kenyan dish made with potatoes, maize, beans, and greens.
ingredients: 1 bunch pumpkin leaves or spinach, chopped
steps: Boil potatoes until soft.
Add maize, beans, and greens; continue cooking until greens are tender.
Mash all together until combined.
Season with salt and serve hot.

recipes.title: Sukuma Wiki
recipes.description: Sautéed collard greens served with ugali or chapati.
steps: Heat oil in a pan and sauté onions until soft.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add greens and stir-fry until wilted but still bright.
Season with salt.
Serve hot with ugali.

recipes.title: Viazi Karai
recipes.description: Coated and deep-fried potatoes popular at the Kenyan coast.
steps: Mix flour, turmeric, salt, and water to form a thick batter.
Dip potato slices into batter.
Deep fry until golden brown.
Drain and serve with tamarind sauce or chutney.

recipes.title: Ndengu (Green Gram Stew)
recipes.description: Nutritious Kenyan green gram stew served with rice or chapati.
ingredients: 1 cup green grams (mung beans), soaked overnight
steps: Boil green grams until soft.
In a pan, sauté onions, garlic, and tomatoes.
Add curry powder and cooked ndengu.
Simmer for 10 minutes and serve hot.

recipes.title: Matoke
recipes.description: Stewed green bananas with onions, tomatoes, and spices.
steps: Heat oil and sauté onion until soft.
Add tomatoes and curry powder; cook 5 mins.
Add chopped bananas and water to cover.
Simmer until bananas are soft and stew is thick.
Serve hot with rice.

recipes.title: Ugali
recipes.description: Kenya's national staple — a dense cornmeal porridge served with vegetables or stews.
steps: Bring water to a boil in a saucepan.
Gradually add flour while stirring continuously.
Stir vigorously until thick and smooth.
Cover and let steam for 3–5 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Sweet Potato with Peanut Sauce
recipes.description: Soft-boiled sweet potatoes topped with creamy peanut sauce.
steps: Boil sweet potatoes until tender.
In another pan, mix peanut butter, water, salt, and lemon juice; heat gently.
Pour sauce over sweet potatoes and serve warm.

recipes.title: Kamande (Lentil Stew)
recipes.description: Kenyan lentil stew cooked in tomato-onion base, often served with rice or chapati.
steps: Boil lentils until soft.
Sauté onion, garlic, and tomatoes in oil.
Add cumin and boiled lentils.
Simmer for 10 minutes.
Serve hot with rice.

recipes.title: Ratatouille
recipes.description: A classic French Provençal vegetable stew.
ingredients: Salt and herbs (thyme, rosemary) to taste
steps: Heat olive oil and sauté onions and garlic.
Add eggplant, zucchini, bell pepper and cook for 5 minutes.
Add tomatoes, herbs, and salt. Simmer for 20 minutes until soft.
Serve hot or chilled with bread or rice.

recipes.title: Pasta Primavera
recipes.description: Italian-style pasta with mixed spring vegetables and herbs.
steps: Boil pasta until al dente and drain.
Sauté garlic and vegetables in olive oil for 5–7 minutes.
Toss in pasta, season, and serve hot.

recipes.title: Spanish Gazpacho
recipes.description: A chilled raw tomato soup perfect for hot summer days.
steps: Blend all vegetables until smooth.
Add olive oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper.
Chill in fridge for 1 hour before serving.

recipes.title: Greek Stuffed Peppers
recipes.description: Bell peppers stuffed with herbed rice and vegetables.
steps: Sauté onion and tomato in olive oil.
Mix with rice, herbs, salt, and pepper.
Stuff into peppers and bake at 180°C for 25 minutes.

recipes.title: German Potato Salad
recipes.description: Warm potato salad with mustard vinaigrette.
steps: Mix vinegar, mustard, oil, salt, and pepper to make dressing.
Toss with warm potatoes and onions.
Let sit 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Minestrone Soup
recipes.description: A hearty Italian vegetable soup with beans and pasta.
steps: Sauté onion and vegetables in olive oil.
Add beans, tomatoes, and broth.
Bring to a boil, add pasta, and simmer until tender.

recipes.title: Swedish Cucumber Salad
recipes.description: Refreshing salad with vinegar-marinated cucumbers.
steps: Mix vinegar, sugar, and salt.
Toss with cucumbers and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Garnish with dill before serving.

recipes.title: Vegetarian Shepherd's Pie
recipes.description: A British classic with lentils and mashed potatoes.
steps: Sauté onion, carrot, and tomato in oil.
Add lentils and cook until thickened.
Transfer to a baking dish, top with mashed potatoes.
Bake at 180°C for 25 minutes until golden.

recipes.title: Hungarian Cabbage Noodles
recipes.description: Comforting dish of sautéed cabbage and wide noodles.
steps: Boil noodles and set aside.
Sauté cabbage and onion in butter until soft.
Mix in noodles, season, and serve hot.

recipes.title: Belgian Endive Gratin
recipes.description: Endives wrapped in cheese sauce, baked until golden.
steps: Steam endives until tender.
Make cheese sauce by melting butter, stirring in flour, milk, and cheese.
Wrap endives in sauce and bake at 190°C for 20 minutes.

recipes.title: Vegetarian Chili
recipes.description: A hearty American-style chili packed with beans and veggies.
steps: Sauté onion, garlic, and bell pepper in olive oil.
Add zucchini, beans, tomatoes, and spices.
Simmer for 25 minutes until thick.
Serve hot with cornbread or rice.

recipes.title: Mac and Cheese
recipes.description: Classic American comfort food with creamy cheese sauce.
steps: Boil pasta and drain.
In another pan, melt butter, whisk in flour, then slowly add milk.
Stir in cheese until melted and smooth.
Mix with macaroni and serve warm.

recipes.title: Cornbread
recipes.description: Moist, golden cornbread — perfect as a side for soups and stews.
steps: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Mix all dry ingredients, then stir in milk and oil.
Pour into greased pan and bake for 25 minutes.
Let cool slightly before slicing.

recipes.title: Sloppy Joe Lentil Sandwiches
recipes.description: A plant-based twist on a classic American sandwich.
steps: Sauté onion and bell pepper.
Add lentils, sauces, and spices. Simmer 10 mins.
Serve on toasted buns.

recipes.title: Avocado Toast
recipes.description: A modern American brunch favorite.
steps: Toast the bread.
Mash avocado and spread on toast.
Season with salt, pepper, and optional toppings.

recipes.title: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
recipes.description: A melty cheese sandwich toasted to golden perfection.
steps: Butter one side of each bread slice.
Place cheese between unbuttered sides.
Grill on pan until golden and melted.

recipes.title: Sweet Potato Hash
recipes.description: Healthy and colorful breakfast hash with sweet potatoes and veggies.
steps: Sauté sweet potato in oil until tender.
Add onion and bell pepper, cook until soft.
Season and serve with avocado or eggs.

recipes.title: Peanut Butter Banana Smoothie
recipes.description: Creamy and energizing breakfast smoothie.
steps: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Serve chilled.

recipes.title: Vegan Pancakes
recipes.description: Fluffy dairy-free pancakes for breakfast or brunch.
steps: Mix dry ingredients, then add wet and stir until smooth.
Cook on greased pan until bubbles form, flip and cook other side.
Serve with syrup or fruit.

recipes.title: Classic Coleslaw
recipes.description: Creamy shredded cabbage and carrot salad.
steps: Mix cabbage and carrot in a bowl.
Stir in mayo, vinegar, salt, and pepper.
Chill before serving.

recipes.title: Meat Samosas
recipes.description: Deep-fried triangular pastry filled with seasoned minced meat.
steps: Cook minced meat with onions, garlic, ginger, and spices until browned.
Cool slightly and fill samosa wrappers.
Fold into triangles and seal with flour paste.
Deep fry until golden brown.

recipes.title: Creamy Mashed Potatoes
recipes.description: Smooth and fluffy mashed potatoes — a versatile side dish.
ingredients: 1/2 cup milk (or warm water for vegan version)
Optional: pinch of black pepper or garlic powder
steps: Boil potatoes in salted water until fork tender (15–20 minutes).
Drain and mash thoroughly.
Add butter and slowly mix in warm milk until smooth.
Season with salt and optional pepper or garlic.
Serve hot with stew or vegetables.

recipes.title: Vegetarian Dumplings
recipes.description: Asian-style steamed dumplings filled with vegetables.
steps: Mix vegetables with soy sauce and seasoning.
Place a spoonful into each wrapper and seal.
Steam for 10–12 minutes until translucent.

recipes.title: Chicken Dumplings
recipes.description: Juicy dumplings filled with seasoned minced chicken.
steps: Mix chicken with soy sauce and spices.
Spoon into wrappers, seal tightly.
Steam or pan-fry until cooked through.

recipes.title: Bhajia
recipes.description: Kenyan-style crispy potato fritters in chickpea batter.
steps: Make a thick batter from flour and spices.
Dip potato slices and deep fry until golden.
Serve with chutney or ketchup.

recipes.title: French Fries
recipes.description: Golden, crispy fries — the classic snack.
ingredients: 4 large potatoes, peeled and cut into fries
steps: Soak fries in cold water 30 minutes, then drain and dry.
Fry in hot oil until golden.
Drain and season with salt.

recipes.title: Chips Masala
recipes.description: Kenyan-style fries coated in spicy tomato masala.
steps: Sauté onions, add blended tomatoes, paste, and spices.
Cook until thick. Toss fries in the sauce.
Serve hot with ketchup or lemon.

recipes.title: Classic Hot Dog
recipes.description: Grilled sausage in a bun with your choice of toppings.
ingredients: Mustard, ketchup, onions, BBQ sauce, Chilli sauce (optional)
steps: Grill sausages until browned.
Warm buns and place sausage inside.
Add preferred toppings and serve.

recipes.title: Veggie Burger
recipes.description: A healthy plant-based burger loaded with flavor.
steps: Grill or pan-fry veggie patty.
Toast bun and assemble with veggies and sauce.
Serve with fries or salad.

recipes.title: Classic Cheeseburger
recipes.description: Grilled beef patty topped with cheese in a soft bun.
steps: Grill patty and top with cheese.
Assemble with bun and veggies.
Serve hot with fries or chips.

recipes.title: Chocolate Muffins
recipes.description: Moist and rich chocolate muffins perfect for snacking.
steps: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Mix dry ingredients in one bowl and wet ingredients in another.
Combine both, pour into muffin cups, and bake for 20 minutes.

recipes.title: Classic Brownies
recipes.description: Fudgy and chocolaty brownies that melt in your mouth.
steps: Preheat oven to 175°C.
Melt butter, mix in sugar, eggs, and vanilla.
Stir in dry ingredients, pour into pan, and bake 25 minutes.

recipes.title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.description: Crispy on the edges, chewy in the center — cookie perfection.
steps: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Cream butter and sugars, add egg and vanilla.
Stir in dry ingredients and chocolate chips.
Scoop onto baking sheet and bake 10–12 minutes.

recipes.title: Simple Vanilla Cake
recipes.description: A soft and fluffy vanilla cake — perfect for any occasion.
steps: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Cream butter and sugar, beat in eggs and vanilla.
Add dry ingredients alternately with milk.
Pour into pan and bake 30–35 minutes.

recipes.title: Banana Bread
recipes.description: Moist, sweet banana bread with a hint of cinnamon.
steps: Preheat oven to 175°C.
Mash bananas and mix with sugar, egg, and oil.
Add dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Pour into loaf pan and bake 40–45 minutes.

recipes.title: Lemon Drizzle Cake
recipes.description: Tangy lemon cake with a sweet lemon glaze.
steps: Cream butter and sugar, beat in eggs, lemon zest and juice.
Add flour and baking powder, pour into pan.
Bake 25–30 mins. Mix lemon juice with powdered sugar for glaze and pour over warm cake.

recipes.title: No-Bake Chocolate Oat Bars
recipes.description: Quick chocolatey bars made without an oven.
steps: Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
Press into a lined tray and refrigerate for 1 hour.
Cut into bars and serve.

recipes.title: Fruit Salad
recipes.description: Colorful mix of fresh fruits in a light honey dressing.
steps: Mix all fruits in a bowl.
Stir in honey and lemon juice.
Chill and serve.

recipes.title: Peanut Butter Cookies
recipes.description: Crunchy and rich cookies with the taste of roasted peanuts.
steps: Mix all ingredients into a dough.
Form balls, flatten, and bake at 175°C for 12–15 minutes.
Cool before serving.

recipes.title: Carrot Cake
recipes.description: Moist cake made with carrots and topped with cream cheese frosting.
steps: Mix wet ingredients with grated carrots.
Add dry ingredients and mix well.
Pour into pan and bake at 175°C for 35–40 minutes.

recipes.title: Scrambled Eggs
recipes.description: Creamy, fluffy scrambled eggs made in minutes.
steps: Crack eggs into a bowl, add milk, and beat lightly.
Heat butter in a pan, pour in eggs, and stir gently.
Cook until just set and fluffy. Season and serve.

recipes.title: Boiled Eggs
recipes.description: Perfect soft or hard-boiled eggs every time.
steps: Place eggs in a saucepan and cover with water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
Simmer 6 min for soft, 10 min for hard-boiled.
Cool in ice water and peel.

recipes.title: Omelette
recipes.description: Fluffy omelette with your choice of fillings.
steps: Beat eggs with milk, salt, and pepper.
Heat pan with oil, pour in mixture.
Add fillings on one side when nearly set.
Fold and cook another minute, then serve.

recipes.title: Spanish Omelette (Tortilla Española)
recipes.description: Hearty Spanish-style omelette with potatoes and onions.
steps: Fry potato slices and onions until soft.
Beat eggs, add cooked veggies, and mix.
Pour into pan and cook on both sides until set.
Slice and serve warm or cold.

recipes.title: Egg Curry
recipes.description: Boiled eggs simmered in a rich tomato-spiced curry.
steps: Sauté onions, add spices, and cook till fragrant.
Add tomato puree and simmer.
Add eggs (whole or halved) and simmer 5–10 minutes.
Serve hot with rice or chapati.

recipes.title: Deviled Eggs
recipes.description: Classic party snack made by filling boiled eggs with a creamy yolk mix.
steps: Cut eggs in half, remove yolks.
Mash yolks with mayo, mustard, salt.
Spoon or pipe back into egg whites.
Sprinkle with paprika.

recipes.title: Egg Fried Rice
recipes.description: Quick stir-fry with rice, scrambled eggs, and veggies.
steps: Scramble eggs in oil and set aside.
Sauté veggies, then add rice and soy sauce.
Mix in scrambled eggs and stir well.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: Shakshuka
recipes.description: North African spiced tomato sauce with poached eggs.
steps: Sauté onions and garlic in oil.
Add spices and tomatoes, simmer until thick.
Make wells and crack eggs into sauce.
Cover and cook until whites are set.
Serve with bread.

recipes.title: Egg Sandwich
recipes.description: A classic egg salad sandwich for breakfast or lunch.
steps: Mash eggs with mayo, salt, and pepper.
Spread on one slice of bread and top with the other.
Cut in half and serve.

recipes.title: Tomato Egg Stir Fry
recipes.description: Quick and flavorful Chinese-style egg stir fry with tomatoes.
steps: Scramble eggs and set aside.
Stir-fry tomatoes with sugar and salt.
Add eggs back in and stir to combine.
Serve with rice or noodles.

recipes.title: Fresh Mango Juice
recipes.description: Sweet, tropical mango juice perfect for a hot day.
steps: Blend mangoes with water until smooth.
Strain if desired.
Add sugar to taste and serve chilled with ice.

recipes.title: Pineapple Mint Juice
recipes.description: Refreshing juice made with pineapple and fresh mint.
steps: Blend pineapple with water and mint.
Strain and serve chilled with ice.

recipes.title: Dawa Drink
recipes.description: Popular Kenyan honey, lemon, and ginger drink known for its healing properties.
ingredients: 1 stick of honey dipper or stirrer
steps: Place honey, lemon juice, and ginger in a glass.
Add hot water and stir with honey stick until well mixed.
Serve warm for best effect.

recipes.title: Tamarind Juice (Ukwaju)
recipes.description: Tangy East African tamarind drink sweetened with sugar.
steps: Soak tamarind pulp in warm water for 10 minutes.
Mash and strain to remove seeds and fibers.
Add sugar, stir, and serve over ice.

recipes.title: Tropical Smoothie
recipes.description: A chilled blend of mango, banana, and pineapple.
steps: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Serve chilled in a glass with a straw.

recipes.title: Passion Fruit Juice
recipes.description: Tangy and aromatic passion fruit juice.
steps: Scoop pulp into a blender, pulse gently.
Strain to remove seeds, mix with water and sugar.
Serve over ice.

recipes.title: Sugarcane Juice
recipes.description: Naturally sweet sugarcane juice popular in many parts of Africa.
steps: Extract juice from sugarcane using a juicer.
Mix with ginger juice if desired.
Serve chilled over ice.

recipes.title: Watermelon Juice
recipes.description: Hydrating and naturally sweet watermelon juice.
steps: Blend watermelon until smooth.
Strain if needed. Add lime juice.
Serve chilled over ice.

recipes.title: Cucumber Avocado Salad
recipes.description: Creamy avocado with refreshing cucumber and lime.
steps: Mix cucumber and avocado in a bowl.
Add lime juice, salt, and pepper.
Serve chilled.

recipes.title: Simple Garden Salad
recipes.description: Fresh lettuce, tomatoes, and cucumber with olive oil dressing.
steps: Combine veggies in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and vinegar.
Toss gently and season to taste.

recipes.title: Chickpea Salad
recipes.description: Protein-packed salad with chickpeas, veggies, and lemon dressing.
steps: Combine chickpeas and veggies in a bowl.
Add olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Toss well and serve.

recipes.title: Fruit Salad with Yogurt
recipes.description: Sweet fruit medley served with creamy yogurt.
steps: Mix fruits in a bowl.
Top with yogurt and drizzle honey.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Quinoa Vegetable Salad
recipes.description: Wholesome salad with quinoa, veggies, and lemon dressing.
steps: Combine quinoa and vegetables.
Drizzle lemon juice and olive oil.
Toss gently and season.

recipes.title: Egg Salad
recipes.description: Chopped boiled eggs with creamy mayo dressing.
steps: Mix chopped eggs with mayo and mustard.
Season to taste and serve on toast or in a sandwich.

recipes.title: Avocado Tomato Salad
recipes.description: Creamy avocado with juicy tomatoes and lemon.
steps: Mix avocado and tomatoes.
Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Serve fresh with chapati or toast.

recipes.title: Cabbage Carrot Slaw (No Mayo)
recipes.description: Light and crunchy cabbage slaw dressed with lemon and oil.
steps: Mix cabbage and carrots in a bowl.
Drizzle lemon juice and oil, then toss well.
Season and chill before serving.

recipes.title: Grilled Chicken Salad
recipes.description: A hearty and healthy salad with grilled chicken, veggies, and a light dressing.
steps: Grill or pan-sear the chicken breast, then slice it thinly.
In a bowl, combine lettuce, cucumber, tomato, and onion.
Add the grilled chicken on top.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
Season with salt and pepper, toss lightly, and serve.

recipes.title: Tuna Salad
recipes.description: Quick and filling salad with tuna, veggies, and lemon dressing.
steps: In a bowl, combine tuna, cucumber, tomato, and onion.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
Toss gently and season to taste.

recipes.title: Tofu Salad
recipes.description: A refreshing plant-based salad with crispy tofu and fresh veggies.
steps: Lightly pan-fry tofu cubes until golden and set aside.
Mix greens and veggies in a bowl.
Top with tofu, drizzle soy sauce, sesame oil, and vinegar.
Toss and serve chilled.

recipes.title: Bean Salad
recipes.description: Colorful protein-rich salad with kidney beans, corn, and bell peppers.
ingredients: 1 cup cooked or canned kidney beans
steps: Mix beans, corn, peppers, and onion in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and vinegar or lemon.
Toss well and season to taste.

recipes.title: Egg & Bacon Salad
recipes.description: Savory salad with boiled eggs, crispy bacon, and greens.
ingredients: 2 slices of bacon, cooked and crumbled
steps: Place greens in a bowl.
Top with chopped eggs and crumbled bacon.
Add dressing, toss gently, and serve.

recipes.title: Chickpea Tuna Salad
recipes.description: High-protein combo of chickpeas and tuna, great for lunch or meal prep.
steps: Mix chickpeas, tuna, and onion in a bowl.
Add lemon juice, olive oil, and seasonings.
Toss well and chill before serving.

recipes.title: Fried Egg Sandwich
recipes.description: Simple sandwich with a seasoned fried egg and tomato.
steps: Fry the egg with salt and pepper.
Toast the bread (optional).
Place egg and tomato slices between bread slices.
Serve hot or packed.

recipes.title: Minced Meat Sandwich
recipes.description: Flavorful minced beef or chicken served between slices of bread.
ingredients: 1/2 cup cooked minced meat (beef or chicken)
steps: Sauté onion and add minced meat with tomato paste and spices.
Cook until done and slightly dry.
Spread between slices of bread and serve hot.

recipes.title: Beans and Avocado Sandwich
recipes.description: Healthy sandwich with mashed beans and creamy avocado.
steps: Mash beans with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Spread mashed beans and avocado on bread.
Close sandwich and serve chilled or warm.

recipes.title: Grilled Chicken Sandwich
recipes.description: Juicy grilled chicken sandwich with fresh vegetables.
steps: Place grilled chicken on one bread slice.
Top with lettuce, tomato, and mayo or sauce.
Close sandwich and serve grilled or plain.

recipes.title: Boiled Egg & Cabbage Sandwich
recipes.description: Affordable and filling sandwich with chopped egg and stir-fried cabbage.
steps: Chop boiled egg and mix with cabbage.
Season with salt, pepper, and optional mayo.
Spread on bread and serve.

recipes.title: Smocha (Smokie Wrap)
recipes.description: Popular Kenyan street snack: a smokie wrapped in a samosa sheet.
ingredients: Tomato sauce, choma sauce or chili sauce
steps: Cook smokie until heated through.
Place smokie on chapati.
Add sauce and optional kachumbari.
Wrap tightly and serve warm.

recipes.title: Kenyan Boerwors Hotdog
recipes.description: Kenyan twist on the classic hotdog using local boerwors sausage.
steps: Grill or fry boerwors until cooked through.
Place inside bun with tomato-onion salsa.
Add ketchup or mustard and serve hot.

recipes.title: BLT Sandwich
recipes.description: Classic sandwich with crispy bacon, lettuce, and tomato.
steps: Toast bread slices.
Spread mayonnaise on one or both sides.
Layer bacon, lettuce, and tomato.
Close sandwich and serve warm or cold.

recipes.title: Veggie Club Sandwich
recipes.description: Triple-decker sandwich packed with fresh vegetables and spread.
steps: Toast the 3 bread slices.
Spread mashed avocado on bottom slice, top with cucumber.
Add second slice of bread, then tomato and lettuce.
Top with third slice, press gently, and cut in half.

recipes.title: Creamy Mushroom Soup
recipes.description: Rich and velvety soup made with mushrooms, cream, and herbs.
steps: Sauté onions and garlic in butter until soft.
Add mushrooms and cook until browned.
Stir in flour to thicken.
Add milk or cream and simmer until creamy.
Season and blend for a smooth texture (optional).

recipes.title: Bone Broth
recipes.description: Nutritious slow-cooked broth from beef or chicken bones.
steps: Place bones and vegetables in a large pot.
Cover with water and bring to a boil.
Simmer for 2–3 hours (or more) on low heat.
Strain and season to taste before serving.

recipes.title: Tomato Basil Soup
recipes.description: Bright and flavorful soup with tomatoes and fresh basil.
steps: Sauté onion and garlic until golden.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Stir in tomato paste and add water or broth.
Simmer for 15 minutes, then blend until smooth.
Stir in chopped basil and serve.

recipes.title: Pumpkin Soup
recipes.description: Smooth and nourishing pumpkin soup spiced with garlic and herbs.
steps: Sauté onions and garlic in oil.
Add pumpkin cubes and spices.
Add water or broth and cook until soft.
Blend until smooth and adjust seasoning.
Serve hot with bread or crackers.

recipes.title: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipes.description: Comforting chicken soup with noodles and vegetables.
steps: Cook chicken, shred and set aside.
Sauté onion, garlic, and carrot in oil.
Add water or broth and bring to boil.
Add noodles and cook until soft.
Stir in shredded chicken, season, and simmer 5 minutes.

recipes.title: Kenyan Uji (Millet Porridge)
recipes.description: Traditional fermented millet porridge, served warm and slightly tangy.
steps: In a bowl, mix millet flour with 1 cup of cold water to make a slurry.
Bring the remaining 2 cups of water to a boil.
Pour in the slurry while stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
Simmer for 10–15 minutes, stirring often.
Add sugar or honey and optional ginger before serving.

recipes.title: Kenyan Chai (Spiced Tea)
recipes.description: Milky black tea infused with spices like ginger, cardamom, and cinnamon.
ingredients: 2 black tea bags or 2 tsp loose tea
steps: Boil water with ginger and cardamom for 3–5 minutes.
Add tea and simmer for another 2 minutes.
Add milk and bring to a gentle boil.
Add sugar and stir.
Strain and serve hot.

recipes.title: Black Coffee (Kahawa Chungu)
recipes.description: Strong unsweetened black coffee served hot, often with mandazi or bread.
steps: Bring water to a boil.
Add ground coffee and optional spices.
Simmer for 3–5 minutes.
Strain and serve hot — no sugar needed.

recipes.title: Fried Eggs and Toast
recipes.description: Classic breakfast plate with sunny-side-up eggs and toasted bread.
steps: Heat oil or butter in a pan.
Crack eggs and fry to desired doneness.
Season with salt and pepper.
Toast the bread and serve with the eggs.

recipes.title: Boiled Sweet Potatoes
recipes.description: Traditional Kenyan breakfast of tender boiled sweet potatoes.
ingredients: 2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled or unpeeled
steps: Wash sweet potatoes thoroughly.
Place in a pot and cover with water.
Boil for 20–30 minutes until soft when pierced.
Drain and serve hot with tea or porridge.

recipes.title: Steamed Arrowroots (Nduma)
recipes.description: Nutritious and filling steamed arrowroots, commonly served for breakfast in Kenya.
steps: Scrub and clean arrowroots well.
Steam or boil for 30–40 minutes until fork tender.
Let cool slightly, peel, and serve warm.

recipes.title: Fluffy Pancakes
recipes.description: Soft, fluffy pancakes perfect for a quick breakfast or brunch.
steps: In a bowl, whisk together dry ingredients.
Add egg, milk, and oil. Mix until smooth.
Heat a lightly oiled pan over medium heat.
Pour 1/4 cup batter and cook until bubbles form.
Flip and cook other side until golden.

recipes.title: French Toast
recipes.description: Golden slices of bread dipped in a cinnamon-vanilla egg mixture and pan-fried to perfection.
ingredients: 1 tsp butter or oil for frying
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, cinnamon, and vanilla together in a bowl.
Dip each slice of bread into the mixture.
Heat butter or oil in a pan over medium heat.
Fry each slice until golden brown on both sides.
Serve hot with syrup, fruit, or honey.

recipes.title: Egg and Spinach Breakfast Wrap
recipes.description: A healthy wrap filled with scrambled eggs and sautéed spinach — quick and nourishing.
steps: Sauté onions and spinach in oil until wilted.
Scramble eggs in the pan with spinach and season.
Warm the tortilla or chapati.
Fill with egg-spinach mixture, roll up, and serve warm.

recipes.title: Avocado and Bean Wrap
recipes.description: Vegan-friendly wrap packed with creamy avocado and spiced beans.
ingredients: 1 tsp chili sauce or tomato paste
steps: Warm beans and mix with chili sauce, salt, and pepper.
Spread mashed avocado on chapati.
Add beans and roll up the wrap.
Slice and serve warm or chilled.

recipes.title: Sausage and Tomato Breakfast Wrap
recipes.description: Hearty wrap with sausage, eggs, and tomatoes — great for a filling start.
steps: Scramble the egg with tomatoes and season.
Add cooked sausage slices.
Place the mixture in a warm chapati and wrap tightly.
Serve hot with a side of sauce.

recipes.title: Kenyan Beef Stew
recipes.description: Hearty and flavorful beef stew cooked with tomatoes, onions, and spices.
ingredients: 1tsp of Spices; curry powder, royco powder, royco beef cubes, black pepper, garam masala)
steps: Sauté onion and garlic in oil until golden.
Add beef and brown on all sides.
Add tomatoes, paste, and spices, cook until soft.
Pour in water or broth, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes or until tender.
Adjust seasoning and serve hot.

recipes.title: Potato Stew
recipes.description: Simple potato stew simmered in a tomato-onion sauce — perfect as a main or side dish.
steps: Heat oil and sauté onion until soft.
Add tomatoes and spices, cook until tomatoes break down.
Add potatoes and stir to coat.
Pour in water and simmer until potatoes are tender (20–25 min).
Serve hot with chapati or rice.

recipes.title: Kenyan Chicken Stew
recipes.description: Juicy chicken pieces simmered in a spiced tomato-onion base — a homestyle Kenyan favorite.
ingredients: Salt, curry powder, royco or chicken masala
steps: Sauté onions until soft, then add garlic-ginger paste.
Add chicken and brown all sides.
Stir in tomatoes, paste, and spices; cook until soft.
Add water or broth and simmer for 30–40 min until chicken is tender.
Serve with ugali, rice, or chapati.
